message:
🐛 Fix Compliance test: update mocks for per-cluster hook shapes (#4769)

Fixes test regression from PR #4754 (global filter wiring) and PR #4767
(drillToCompliance). The hooks now return per-cluster statuses with
.cluster, .installed, .vulnerabilities fields instead of the old
aggregated format. Updates all mock helpers and adds drillToCompliance
to the useDrillDownActions mock.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
